message:
perf(mvcc,vdbe): skip uncontended conflict history and optimize hot register paths

MVCC: Remove redundant committed_readers/committed_writers publication
in finalize_prepared_concurrent_commit_with_ssi when the transaction is
uncontended — the conflict history is unnecessary since no concurrent
transaction could have observed a conflict, and prune runs immediately
after. Updates tests to assert the lists stay empty.

Value: Add #[inline] hints to is_null, as_integer, as_float,
to_integer, and to_float accessors to help the compiler inline these
small match-arms at call sites in the VDBE hot loop.

VDBE engine: Replace set_reg with set_reg_fast/set_reg_int in bitwise
ops (BitAnd, BitOr, ShiftLeft, ShiftRight, BitNot), Cast, AddImm,
RealAffinity, comparison STOREP2 paths, And/Or/Not logic opcodes.
Refactor Function opcode to slice directly into the register file
instead of allocating via collect_reg_range. Promote set_reg_fast to
#[inline(always)] and add #[inline] to take_reg, take_reg_range, and
set_reg.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
